dict.string: Move Divider Left Resize Split Pane.Move Divider Left
Move Divider Down Resize Split Pane.Move Divider Down
Move Divider Up Resize Split Pane.Move Divider Up
Move Divider Right Resize Split Pane.Move Divider Right

dict.key: Movement Keys Scroll Outside Interactive Apps
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
